form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 10 at Greyville on March 22 over 2000m, 9 len behind Continentalexpress carrying 52kg at $81. The run before that 5th of 9 at this track on February 15 over 2400m, 4 len behind Curious Girl carrying 51.1kg at $81. Cannot be ruled out despite a moderate effort last time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). At the latest run 7th of 10 at Greyville on March 22 over 2000m, 9 len behind Continentalexpress carrying 52kg at $81. The run before that 5th of 9 at this track on February 15 over 2400m, 4 len behind Curious Girl carrying 51.1kg at $81. Cannot be ruled out despite a moderate effort last time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rolled out away from the crop and at the 100m, brushed out Spectacular.
Commenced to give ground to the field from the 300m.
Lost 1 length. After the 500m, bumped and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 13 at Greyville on March 22 over 1900m, 4.5 len behind Hodgepodge carrying 52kg at $151. Before that 8th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1900m, 11 len behind Sesame with 52.4kg at $101. Preferred in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Last start 7th of 13 at Greyville on March 22 over 1900m, 4.5 len behind Hodgepodge carrying 52kg at $151. Before that 8th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1900m, 11 len behind Sesame with 52.4kg at $101. Preferred in something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped with its head up and lost 1 length.
Shortly after the start, stumbled badly and dislodged Jockey P Strydom.
Baulked for a clear run from the 400m to the 200m.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 52-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last of 9 at this track on February 15 over 2400m, 14 len behind Curious Girl with 58.5kg at $51. Previously second-up 8th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on September 24 over 2000m, 7 len behind Syx Hotfix with 60kg at $26. Don't underestimate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Second run back. Comes off a 52-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last of 9 at this track on February 15 over 2400m, 14 len behind Curious Girl with 58.5kg at $51. Previously second-up 8th of 10 at Greyville All Weather on September 24 over 2000m, 7 len behind Syx Hotfix with 60kg at $26. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run won by a neck at Greyville All Weather April 3 over 1600m defeating My Lucky Charm carrying 60kg at $9. The run before that 3rd of 11 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Pied Piper carrying 56.5kg at $6. Impressed last start and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(16.5). Recent form sound. At the latest run won by a neck at Greyville All Weather April 3 over 1600m defeating My Lucky Charm carrying 60kg at $9. The run before that 3rd of 11 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Pied Piper carrying 56.5kg at $6. Impressed last start and can go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out away from the crop in the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 4th of 15 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 2 len behind Cleartherunway with 58kg at $67. Second run from a spell 9th of 11 at this track on March 15 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Master Bomber carrying 58kg at $9.50. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 4th of 15 at this track on February 15 over 1500m, 2 len behind Cleartherunway with 58kg at $67. Second run from a spell 9th of 11 at this track on March 15 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Master Bomber carrying 58kg at $9.50. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 300m, came together and brushed Bom Bom.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last of 13 at Greyville on March 22 over 1900m, 11 len behind Hodgepodge carrying 58.5kg at $51. The start before that 6th of 10 at this track on January 25 over 1950m, 6 len behind Curious Girl with 60kg at $34. Hard to envisage a win today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). At the latest run ran last of 13 at Greyville on March 22 over 1900m, 11 len behind Hodgepodge carrying 58.5kg at $51. The start before that 6th of 10 at this track on January 25 over 1950m, 6 len behind Curious Girl with 60kg at $34. Hard to envisage a win today.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 13 at Greyville on March 22 over 1900m, 2.25 len behind Hodgepodge with 56kg at $34. Before that ran last of 10 at this track on February 18 over 1950m, 14 len behind Zena Rose carrying 58.5kg at $15. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At the latest run 4th of 13 at Greyville on March 22 over 1900m, 2.25 len behind Hodgepodge with 56kg at $34. Before that ran last of 10 at this track on February 18 over 1950m, 14 len behind Zena Rose carrying 58.5kg at $15. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up won by a long-neck at Greyville All Weather February 27 over 1800m defeating Dream Decision carrying 59.6kg at $6. Last start 6th of 10 at Greyville on March 22 over 2000m, 8 len behind Continentalexpress carrying 52.1kg at $101. Genuine hope on best form.

Last start 6th of 10 at Greyville on March 22 over 2000m, 8 len behind Continentalexpress carrying 52.1kg at $101. Genuine hope on best form.
